## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Danni R for Managing Editor role at GrowthX Publication](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an AI-powered platform for knowledge workers, starting with a content/growth agency](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [The company aims to create a detached community resource for AI education in marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Danni has extensive experience in content marketing, AI education, and community building at Surfer](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [The role involves leading content creation for GrowthX's community and broader marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Overview

  - [Founded \~1 year ago, venture-funded (raised Series A in March)](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=2764.0)
  - [Operates as a content/growth agency for B2B SaaS companies (70+ clients)](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Uses AI-powered workflows to create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Offers workshops and education on AI-powered content creation](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Building a community platform (100+ paying members) for AI education in marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Role Description and Responsibilities

  - [Lead content creation for GrowthX's community and broader marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Partner with internal experts to develop courses, workshops, and educational content](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Potentially manage a team of writers/AI tools in the future](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=4060.0)
  - [Report to Jason (Head of Growth) initially, work closely with future Community Lead](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3840.0)
  - [Help shape the content strategy for various GrowthX initiatives (agency, community, products)](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Danni's Background and Experience

  - [4+ years at Surfer in various content and marketing roles](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Created SEO masterclasses and AI-focused courses](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Built Surfer's content team and community (13,000+ members)](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Strong background in education and explaining complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)

### GrowthX's Approach to Feedback and Communication

  - [Emphasis on async, written communication (e.g., Notion docs)](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3597.0)
  - [Direct feedback style, but with a culture that embraces learning from failures](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3566.0)
  - [Regular leadership meetings and 1:1s to shape strategy and operations](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=4260.0)

### Community and Content Vision

  - [Targeting operators/practitioners as primary community members](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3386.0)
  - [Plans for a "council" tier for CMOs and executives](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3517.0)
  - [Potential to partner with other tools/companies (e.g., Webflow) for comprehensive solutions](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3489.0)
  - [Focus on creating practical, hands-on content that showcases real results](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Danni to consider any additional questions about the role or company](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=4531.0)
  - [Jason to further refine the role structure and reporting relationships](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=3840.0)
  - [Discuss potential writing assignment or next interview steps](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [If moving forward, Danni would need to give 2-4 weeks notice to current employer](https://fathom.video/share/m1K5FXyV1sQ4ZKBsRh3CCa42FG67icUk?tab=summary&timestamp=4531.0)
